TweakWhy_AccountProtectionWarn: I-Windows Security ibonisa isexwayiso uma ungangenanga ngemvume nge-akhawunti ye-Microsoft. Ukukhubaza kufihla lesi saziso esiqhubekayo.
TweakWhy_ActiveHours: Ichaza ibanga lesikhathi lapho i-Windows ingeke iqale kabusha i-PC yakho ngokuzenzakalelayo ukuze iqedele ukufaka izibuyekezo.
TweakWhy_ActivityHistory: Irekhoda umsebenzi wakho kuwo wonke amadivayisi uma ungene ngemvume ku-akhawunti ye-Microsoft futhi ingawuvumelanisa namafu. Ukukhubaza kugcina umsebenzi usendaweni.
TweakWhy_AdminApprovalMode: Ilawula ukuthi Ukulawulwa Kwe-akhawunti Yomsebenzisi kusebenza kanjani uma uhlelo lokusebenza lucela amalungelo aphakeme. Ukwaziswa okuzenzakalelayo kwemvume, Ungalokothi ukhubaze ukwaziswa kwe-UAC. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_AdobeNetworkBlock: Yengeza imithetho ye-firewall ukuze uvimbele izinhlelo zokusebenza ze-Adobe ekufinyeleleni ku-inthanethi. Lokhu kuthinta ukuqinisekiswa kwelayisense, ukuvumelanisa kwamafu, nezici ze-Creative Cloud. Lolu wushintsho olunobungozi obukhulu okungenzeka kube nzima noma kungenzeki ukuluhlehlisa.
TweakWhy_AdvancedStartupShortcut: Dala isinqamuleli sedeskithophu esiqala kabusha i‑PC ngokushesha siye kwimenyu ye‑Advanced Startup Options (Windows Recovery Environment).
TweakWhy_AdvertisingID: I-Windows inikeza i-ID yokukhangisa ehlukile ku-akhawunti yakho leyo izinhlelo zokusebenza ezingayisebenzisa ukubonisa izikhangiso eziqondiwe. Ukukhubaza kumisa lokhu kulandelela.
TweakWhy_AeroShaking: Ukunyakazisa ibha yesihloko sewindi kunciphisa wonke amanye amawindi avuliwe. Khubaza uma uthola lokhu kubangeli ngephutha phakathi nokusetshenziswa okuvamile.
TweakWhy_AppColorMode: Isetha imodi yombala ezenzakalelayo esetshenziswa izinhlelo zokusebenza uma zihlonipha ukulungiselelwa kwesistimu: Okumnyama noma Okukhanyayo.
TweakWhy_AppsLanguageSwitch: Ivumela iWindows ukuthi ikhumbule futhi ishintshele kolunye ulimi lokufakwayo noma isakhiwo sekhibhodi ngewindi lohlelo lokusebenza.
TweakWhy_AppsSilentInstalling: IWindows ingafaka buthule izinhlelo zokusebenza eziphakanyisiwe ngemuva ngaphandle kokukubuza. Ukukhubaza kumisa lokhu kuziphatha. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_AppsSmartScreen: I-SmartScreen ihlola amafayela alandiwe nezinhlelo zokusebenza ngokumelene nesizindalwazi sesithunzi sefu futhi ikuxwayise ngaphambi kokusebenzisa okusebenzisekayo okungaziwa. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_AutoRebootOnCrash: Lapho iWindows iphahlazeka (isikrini esiluhlaza), ingaqala kabusha ngokuzenzakalelayo. Ukukhubaza kugcina iphutha esikrinini ukuze ufunde ikhodi yokumisa.
TweakWhy_Autoplay: Ilawula ukuthi iWindows ivula ngokuzenzakalelayo ukwaziswa noma iqalise uhlelo lokusebenza lapho ufaka idrayivu ye-USB noma enye imidiya ekhiphekayo.
TweakWhy_BSoDStopError: Ibonisa ikhodi yephutha ethile esikrinini sokufa esiluhlaza esikhundleni se-emoji yobuso obudabukisayo.
TweakWhy_BackgroundApps: Ilawula ukuthi izinhlelo zokusebenza zivunyelwe yini ukuthi zisebenze futhi zibuyekeze ngemuva uma zingagxilile. Ukukhubaza kusindisa i-CPU nenkumbulo. Lolu wushintsho olunobungozi obukhulu okungenzeka kube nzima noma kungenzeki ukuluhlehlisa.
TweakWhy_BingSearch: Ibhokisi lokusesha lemenyu yokuqala lingabonisa imiphumela yewebhu ye-Bing eduze nemiphumela yendawo. Ukukhubaza kugcina usesho lwe-Start Menu lusendaweni kuphela.
TweakWhy_BootRecovery: Ilawula ukuthi iWindows ingena ngokuzenzakalela kumodi yokutakula ngemva kwemizamo yokubhula ehlulekile elandelanayo. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_BraveDebloat: Ikhubaza okungeziwe okungakhethwa kwesiphequluli se-Brave: imiklomelo, i-crypto wallet, i-VPN, nengxoxo ye-AI. Ithinta kuphela lezi zici eziqondene ne-Brave, hhayi ukuphequlula kwakho. Lolu wushintsho olunobungozi obukhulu okungenzeka kube nzima noma kungenzeki ukuluhlehlisa.
TweakWhy_BuildNumberOnDesktop: Ibonisa inombolo yokwakha ye-Windows kanye ne-edishini njenge-watermark ekhoneni elingezansi kwesokudla sedeskithophu yakho.
TweakWhy_CABInstallContext: Yengeza inketho yokufaka kumenyu yokuqukethwe yokuchofoza kwesokudla yamafayela engobo yomlando ye-.cab.
TweakWhy_CIMemoryIntegrity: Ubuqotho bekhodi evikelwe nge-Hypervisor kusebenzisa ikhodi ye-kernel ye-Windows endaweni eyenziwe ngokoqobo ukuze kuvinjwe uhlelo olungayilungele ikhompuyutha olusezingeni le-kernel kanye nama-rootkits. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_Camera: I-Master toggle elawula ukuthi izinhlelo zokusebenza zingakucela yini ukufinyelela kukhamera yakho. Ukukhubaza kuvimbela zonke izinhlelo zokusebenza ekusebenziseni ikhamera. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_CapsLock: Ilawula ukuthi ukhiye we-Caps Lock uvuliwe yini. Ukukhubaza kabusha ukhiye we-Caps Lock ngakho ukuyicindezela akwenzi lutho.
TweakWhy_ChangingSoundScheme: Ilawula ukuthi abasebenzisi bangakwazi yini ukushintsha isikimu somsindo se-Windows. Ukukhubaza lokhu kukhiya isikimu samanje futhi kuvimbela izinguquko.
TweakWhy_CheckBoxes: Ibonisa amabhokisi okuhlola amancane eduze kwamafayela namafolda ku-Explorer ukuze kube lula ukukhetha izinto eziningi ngaphandle kokubamba u-Ctrl.
TweakWhy_CheckWinGet: I-WinGet iyimenenja yephakheji eyakhelwe ngaphakathi ye-Windows esetshenziselwa ukufaka nokuvuselela izinhlelo zokusebenza emgqeni womyalo. Lokhu kuqinisekisa ukuthi ifakiwe futhi isesikhathini samanje.
TweakWhy_ClearRecentFiles: Isula ngokuzenzakalelayo uhlu lwamafayela akamuva njalo lapho uphuma. Ithuthukisa ubumfihlo emishinini eyabiwe noma enabasebenzisi abaningi.
TweakWhy_ClipboardHistory: Igcina umlando wezinto ezikopishiwe ukuze unamathisele iziqeshana ezidlule usebenzisa i-Win+V. Nika amandla ukuvula lesi sici.
TweakWhy_CompressedFolderNewContext: Ibonisa noma ifihla inketho Yefolda Ecindezelwe (eziphulwe) ngokuchofoza kwesokudla Imenyu engaphansi entsha ku-File Explorer.
TweakWhy_ConnectionSharing: Ivumela le PC ukuthi yabelane ngoxhumano lwayo lwe-inthanethi namanye amadivaysi, esebenza njenge-software hotspot. Ukunika amandla kubonisa le nketho kuzilungiselelo zenethiwekhi. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_ControlPanelView: Isetha isitayela sokubonisa esizenzakalelayo Sephaneli Yokulawula sibe Izithonjana Ezinkulu, Izithonjana Ezincane, noma ukuqoqwa Kwesigaba okuzenzakalelayo.
TweakWhy_Copilot: Isusa i-Copilot, Recall, nazo zonke izingxenye ze-Windows AI ezihlobene. Ukufaka kabusha kudinga ukufinyelela kwe-winget noma kwe-Microsoft Store.
TweakWhy_CortanaAutostart: Ivimbela u-Cortana ukuthi aqalise ngokuzenzakalelayo ekuqaleni. I-Cortana isengavulwa ngesandla uma kudingeka.
TweakWhy_CreateRestorePoint: Idala iphoyinti Lokubuyisela Isistimu ye-Windows ukuze ukwazi ukuhlehlisa izinguquko zesistimu uma kukhona okungahambi kahle. Kunconyiwe ngaphambi kokusebenzisa noma yikuphi ukulungisa.
TweakWhy_CrossDeviceResume: Ikuvumela ukuthi uqalise kabusha imisebenzi esuka kwamanye amadivaysi e-Windows kule PC usebenzisa i-pop-up yesaziso. Khubaza uma ungasisebenzisi lesi sici samadivayisi ahlukene.
TweakWhy_CurrentNetwork: Isetha iphrofayela yenethiwekhi yoxhumano lwakho olusebenzayo njengamanje. Okuyimfihlo kunika amandla ukutholwa kwenethiwekhi nokwabelana, Ukukhawulela umphakathi. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_DEPOptOut: Imisa Ukuvinjelwa Kokusetshenziswa Kwedatha ibe Imodi Ye-OptOut, ivumela ukuvikelwa kwe-DEP kuzo zonke izinqubo ngaphandle kwalezo ongazibandakanyi ngokusobala. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_DNSoverHTTPS: Ibethela ukubheka kwe-DNS ngokukuthumela nge-HTTPS esikhundleni se-UDP engenalutho. Ivimbela i-ISP yakho noma inethiwekhi ekuqapheni noma ekuphazamiseni ithrafikhi ye-DNS. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_DefaultTerminalApp: Isetha ukuthi yiluphi uhlelo lokusebenza lwetheminali oluvulekayo lapho wethula i-Command Prompt noma i-PowerShell ngaphakathi kwe-Windows.
TweakWhy_DefenderAppGuard: Ivula amathebhu esiphequluli se-Edge emshinini ongayedwana obonakalayo ukuze kuvinjelwe amawebhusayithi anonya ekufinyeleleni isistimu yokusingatha noma amafayela ayo. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_DefenderCloud: Inika amandla ukuvikelwa okusekelwe efwini kwe-Microsoft Defender ekuhloleni usongo lwesikhathi sangempela kusetshenziswa imininingo egciniwe ye-Microsoft ye-intelligence intelligence global. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_DefenderSandbox: Isebenzisa injini ye-antivirus ye-Microsoft Defender ngaphakathi kwenqubo ye-sandbox engayodwa ukuze uthole ukuvikelwa okwengeziwe. Yengeza i-overhead encane yokusebenza. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_DefenderTrayIcon: Ibonisa noma ifihla isithonjana seWindows Security (Defender) kuthreyi yesistimu. Ukuyifihla akuvimbi ukuvikela kwe-Defender.
TweakWhy_DeliveryOptimization: I-Windows ingasebenzisa i-PC yakho ukwabelana ngedatha yokulanda i-Windows Update namanye ama-PC kunethiwekhi yakho noma ku-inthanethi. Ukukhubaza kugcina ukulanda kwakho kuyimfihlo. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_DiagTrackService: Isevisi ye-DiagTrack iqoqa futhi ilayishe ukusetshenziswa kwe-Windows nedatha yokuxilonga kumaseva e-Microsoft. Ukuyikhubaza kumisa ukulayisha kwe-telemetry yangemuva. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_DiagnosticDataLevel: Ilawula ukuthi ingakanani idatha yokuxilonga i-Windows ethumela ku-Microsoft. Okuncane kuthumela kuphela ulwazi oluyisisekelo lwedivayisi nedatha yokwethembeka.
TweakWhy_DisableAESCiphers: Ikhubaza ukufakwa kwe-cipher okubuthakathaka kwe-AES endala kusendlalelo sezokuphepha se-Windows SCHANNEL. Iphoqa izinhlelo zokusebenza ukuthi zixoxisane ngokucushwa kwe-cipher okuqinile. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_DisableAutoRun: Ivimbela iWindows ekusebenziseni ngokuzenzakalelayo izinhlelo kumadrayivu e-USB nakweminye imidiya ekhiphekayo. Imisa i-vector evamile yokusabalalisa uhlelo olungayilungele ikhompuyutha.
TweakWhy_DisableHashAlgorithms: Ilungiselela izilungiselelo ze-algorithm ye-SCHANNEL. Ikhubaza i-MD5 futhi inike amandla ama-algorithms omndeni we-SHA ukuze kuqinisekiswe ubuqotho obuqinile. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_DisableIPv6: Ikhubaza isistimu yesitaki sephrothokholi ye-IPv6 ububanzi. Kunconyiwe uma inethiwekhi yakho ingasebenzisi i-IPv6 ukwehlisa indawo yokuhlasela engadingekile. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_DisableRC2RC4Ciphers: Ikhubaza i-RC2 ne-RC4 cipher ku-SCHANNEL. Lawa ma-algorithms aphukile aphukile futhi akufanele asetshenziswe kunoma yikuphi ukuxhumana kwe-TLS. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_DisableRemoteCommands: I-DCOM iyiphrothokholi yokwenza kusebenze kude edingwa amathuluzi okuphatha ibhizinisi (SCCM, WMI). Ukuyikhubaza kunciphisa indawo yokuhlasela kodwa kungase kwephule ukuhamba komsebenzi wokuphatha kude.
TweakWhy_DisableSMBv3Compression: Ivala ukucindezelwa kwe-SMB ukuze kuvikelwe ku-CVE-2020-0796. Ithinta kuphela ukucindezela kwethrafikhi ye-SMB, hhayi isivinini sokufinyelela ifayela. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_DisableTCPTimestamps: Isusa ulwazi lwe-TCP timestamp kumaphakethe enethiwekhi. Ivimbela izinhlelo ezikude ekuboniseni i-OS yakho ngokusekelwe esikhathini sokusebenza. Lolu shintsho lunengozi emaphakathi futhi lungathinta eminye imisebenzi.
TweakWhy_DisableTripleDESCipher: Ikhubaza i-DES Kathathu (3DES) ku-SCHANNEL. I-3DES isengozini yokuhlaselwa usuku lokuzalwa lwe-SWEET32 futhi ayisabhekwa njengevikelekile. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_DiskCleanup: Isebenzisa ithuluzi elakhelwe ngaphakathi le-Windows Disk Cleanup ukuze kukhishwe amafayela esikhashana, inqolobane yesistimu, nenye idatha engadingeki ukuze kukhululwe isikhala sediski. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_DismissMSAccount: Isusa umyalo ovelayo ku-Windows Security ikucela ukuthi ungene ngemvume nge-akhawunti ye-Microsoft ukuze uthole ukuvikelwa okwengeziwe.
TweakWhy_DismissSmartScreenFilter: Isusa umyalo ovelayo ku-Windows Security ikucela ukuthi unike amandla isihlungi sesithunzi se-SmartScreen.
TweakWhy_DownloadBlocking: Ilawula ukuthi iWindows Security iyamaka yini amafayela alandiwe njenganamandla angaphephile kusetshenziswa okunye ukusakaza kwedatha ye-Zone.Identifier.
TweakWhy_EdgeDebloat: Isebenzisa izilungiselelo Zenqubomgomo Yeqembu ukuze ukhubaze i-telemetry, umsizi wokuthenga, amaqoqo, ibha eseceleni ye-Copilot, nokunye okungeziwe ongakukhetha kwe-Edge. Lolu wushintsho olunobungozi obukhulu okungenzeka kube nzima noma kungenzeki ukuluhlehlisa.
TweakWhy_EditWithClipchampContext: Ibonisa noma ifihla inketho ethi Hlela nge-Clipchamp kumenyu yokuqukethwe yokuchofoza kwesokudla yamafayela evidiyo.
TweakWhy_EditWithPaintContext: Ibonisa noma ifihla inketho ethi Hlela ngopende kumenyu yokuqukethwe yokuchofoza kwesokudla kumafayela esithombe.
TweakWhy_EditWithPhotosContext: Ibonisa noma ifihla inketho yokuhlela ngezithombe kumenyu yokuqukethwe yokuchofoza kwesokudla kumafayela esithombe.
TweakWhy_EnableBiometricsAntiSpoofing: Inika amandla i-anti-spoofing ethuthukisiwe ye-Windows Hello yokubonwa kobuso. Kusebenza kuphela uma unehadiwe ye-biometric ehambisanayo.
TweakWhy_EnableSMBGuestCompatibility: Ivumela ukuxhumeka kwe-SMB ekwabelaneni kwenethiwekhi ngaphandle kokudinga ukuqinisekiswa. Iyadingeka ukuze ufinyelele kumadivayisi amadala e-NAS, amaphrinta, noma amarutha. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_EncCompFilesColor: Ibonisa amafayela abethelwe ngamafayela aluhlaza nacindezelwe aluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka ku-File Explorer. Yenza lezi zinhlobo zamafayela zibonakale ngokushesha.
TweakWhy_EnhPointerPrecision: Ukusheshisa kwegundane okulungisa isivinini sekhesa ngokusekelwe ekutheni ulisusa ngokushesha kangakanani igundane. Khubaza okokufaka kwegundane okungaguquki, okunconyelwe ukudlala.
TweakWhy_ErrorReporting: Uma uhlelo luphahlazeka, Ukubika Ngephutha kweWindows kungathumela umbiko ku-Microsoft. Ukukhubaza kumisa le datha ekuphumeni komshini wakho.
TweakWhy_EventViewerCustomView: Idala ukubuka ngokwezifiso kusibukeli somcimbi esihlungiwe ukuze kuboniswe imicimbi yokudalwa kwenqubo, okwenza kube lula ukuhlola ukuthi yiziphi izinhlelo eziqalisiwe.
TweakWhy_ExplorerAutoDiscovery: I-File Explorer ithola uhlobo lokuqukethwe kwefolda ngayinye futhi isebenzise isifanekiso sokubuka esifanayo. Ukukhubaza kukhiya wonke amafolda ukuze abukeke ngendlela efanayo.
TweakWhy_ExplorerTitleFullPath: Ibonisa indlela yefolda ephelele kubha yesihloko ye-File Explorer esikhundleni segama lefolda kuphela. Iwusizo lapho usebenza namafolda amaningi anegama elifanayo.
TweakWhy_F1HelpPage: Ukucindezela okuthi F1 ku-File Explorer noma kudeskithophu kuvula iwebhusayithi yosizo yeWindows esipheqululini sakho. Ukukhubaza kuvimbela ukuqaliswa kwalesi siphequluli.
TweakWhy_F8BootMenu: Inika amandla imenyu yokuqalisa ukhiye wefa we-F8 ekuvumela ukuthi ukhethe Imodi ephephile nezinye izinketho zokuqalisa phakathi nenqubo yokuqalisa i-Windows.
TweakWhy_FastStartup: Imodi yokuvala shaqa eyingxube egcina i-kernel state kudiski ukuze iWindows iqale ngokushesha. Ingabangela izinkinga ngokusetha okukabili noma ukuvala shaqa okugcwele.
TweakWhy_FeedbackFrequency: Ilawula ukuthi i-Windows ikucela kangaki ukuthi ukale umuzwa wakho noma uthumele impendulo. Ukusetha kokuthi Ayisoze yamisa yonke imiyalo yempendulo.
TweakWhy_FileDeleteConfirm: Ibonisa ibhokisi lokuqinisekisa ngaphambi kokususa unomphela ifayela. Nika amandla ukuthola ukwaziswa ngaphambi kokuthi amafayela athunyelwe ku-Recycle Bin.
TweakWhy_FileExplorerCompactMode: Yehlisa isikhala phakathi kwezinto ku‑File Explorer ukuze kube nombono wohlu ominyene, onolwazi oluningi.
TweakWhy_FileExtensions: Ibonisa isandiso sefayela (isb. .txt, .exe) ngemva kwegama ngalinye lefayela ku-Explorer. Isiza ukubona ukuthi hlobo luni lwefayela ngokubuka nje.
TweakWhy_FileOperationsDetails: Ibonisa ingxoxo enemininingwane yenqubekelaphambili yokusebenza kwefayela (kopisha, hambisa, susa) ngokuzenzakalelayo esikhundleni sebha encane yokuqhubeka.
TweakWhy_FileTransferDialog: Ilawula ukuthi ingabe ibhokisi lengxoxo lokukopisha nokuhambisa libonisa imininingwane egcwele njengesivinini nesikhathi esisele ngokuzenzakalelayo.
TweakWhy_Firewall: Inika amandla noma ikhubaze i-Windows Defender Firewall kuwo wonke amaphrofayili enethiwekhi. Ukukhubaza kushiya zonke izimbobo ezingenayo zingahlungiwe ngokuphelele. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_FirstLogonAnimation: Ibonisa ukugqwayiza kafushane kokwamukela kanye nesikrini sika-Hi okokuqala ngqa lapho ungena ngemvume ngemva kwesibuyekezo esikhulu se-Windows.
TweakWhy_FldrSeparateProcess: Ivula iwindi lefolda le-Explorer ngalinye ngenqubo yalo. Uma enye iphahlazeka, ezinye zihlala zivulekile. Isebenzisa inkumbulo ethe xaxa.
TweakWhy_FolderGroupBy: Ilawula ukuthi amafayela akufolda yokulandiwe aqoqwe ngedethi elungiswe ngayo. Ukusetha okuthi Lutho kubonisa wonke amafayela ohlwini oluyisicaba.
TweakWhy_FullscreenOptimizations: Isici se-Windows esilungiselela imidlalo nezinhlelo zokusebenza ezisebenza ngemodi yesikrini esigcwele ukuze zisebenze kangcono. Ukukhubaza kungalungisa izinkinga zokusebenzisana kweminye imidlalo emidala.
TweakWhy_GPUScheduling: Ukuhlela i-GPU esheshiswe ngezingxenyekazi zekhompuyutha kuvumela i-GPU ukuthi ilawule inkumbulo yayo yevidiyo ngokuqondile, okunamandla okunciphisa ukubambezeleka kokufaka kumageyimu.
TweakWhy_GameDVR: Ukurekhoda kwangemuva kuthwebula ngokuqhubekayo indlela yokudlala ukuze ukwazi ukulondoloza imizuzu embalwa yokugcina ngemva kokwenzeka okuthile. Ukukhubaza kukhulula izinsiza ze-GPU nediski ukuze kube nokuvumelana okungcono kwe-FPS.
TweakWhy_Hibernation: Ilondoloza konke okuqukethwe kwe-RAM kudiski futhi inika amandla i-PC ngokuphelele. Ifayela le-hibernation lingasebenzisa ama-gigabytes amaningana esikhala sediski.
TweakWhy_HiddenItems: Ibonisa amafayela namafolda amakwe njengafihliwe ku-File Explorer. Izinto ezifihliwe zivela sobala kancane uma zibonakala.
TweakWhy_HomeGroups: Amaqembu Asekhaya kwakuyisici se-Windows sokwabelana ngamafayela phakathi kwama-PC asekhaya. Ikhishwe ngaphakathi Windows 10 1803 kodwa izinsiza ezisele zisengaba khona.
TweakWhy_ImportExploitProtectionPolicy: Ilanda futhi ingenise ifayela lenqubomgomo yokunciphisa ukuxhaphaza elakhelwe ngaphambili ku-Windows Defender Exploit Guard, kusetshenziswa ukuncishiswa kwenqubo yangokwezifiso. Lolu wushintsho olunobungozi obukhulu okungenzeka kube nzima noma kungenzeki ukuluhlehlisa.
TweakWhy_InputMethod: Isetha indlela yokufaka yekhibhodi ezenzakalelayo esebenzisa iWindows. IsiNgisi siphoqa ukwakheka kwesiNgisi ngokunganaki ezinye izilimi ezifakiwe.
TweakWhy_JPEGWallpapersQuality: IWindows icindezela amaphephadonga we-JPEG lapho iwabeka njengengemuva ledeskithophu. Ukusetha kokuthi Max kulondoloza ikhwalithi yesithombe esigcwele.
TweakWhy_LLMNR: I-Link-Local Multicast Name Resolution ixazulula amagama omethuleli kumanethiwekhi endawo. Ingasetshenziswa ekuhlaselweni kokuthwebula izifakazelo futhi ikhutshazwa kangcono kakhulu. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_LanguageListAccess: Ivumela amawebhusayithi ukuthi afunde uhlu lwakho oluthandwayo lolimi lwe-Windows ukuze ahlanganise okuqukethwe. Khubaza ukuze uvimbele amawebhusayithi ekutholeni izilungiselelo zakho zolimi.
TweakWhy_LanmanWorkstationGuestAuthPolic: Ukufakazela ubuqiniso kwesivakashi se-SMB ivekhtha eyaziwayo yokunyakaza engemuva ekhutshazwe ngokuzenzakalela kusukela ku-Windows 10 1709. Ukukunika amandla kuveza isistimu ekufinyeleleni kwe-SMB okungagunyaziwe. Nika amandla kuphela ukusebenzisana kwedivayisi yefa.
TweakWhy_LatestInstalled.NET: Iphoqa izinhlelo zokusebenza ezingama-32-bit kanye ne-64-bit ukuthi zisebenzise inguqulo yesikhathi sokusebenza entsha ye-NET esikhundleni senguqulo ezazakhelwe ngokumelene nayo ekuqaleni.
TweakWhy_LocalSecurityAuthority: Isebenzisa inqubo ye-Windows LSA ngemodi evikelekile ukuze kuvinjelwe ukwebiwa kwemininingwane ngamathuluzi afana ne-Mimikatz. Inconyelwe wonke amasistimu. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_LocationService: Ilawula ukuthi izinhlelo zokusebenza zingakwazi yini ukufinyelela indawo yedivayisi yakho. Ukukhubaza kuvimbela ukulandelela indawo ngazo zonke izinhlelo zokusebenza. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_LockScreen: Ilawula ukuthi isikrini sokukhiya se-Windows siyavezwa ngaphambi kwesikrini sokungena ngemvume Windows 11.
TweakWhy_LockScreenBlur: Ifaka umphumela wokufiphalisa we-acrylic kungemuva lesikrini sokungena ngemvume. Ukukhubaza kubonisa ingemuva ngaphandle kokufiphala.
TweakWhy_LockScreenRS1: Ilawula ukuthi isikrini sokukhiya se-Windows siyaboniswa yini ngaphambi kokuthi kuvulwe isikrini sokungena ngemvume Windows 10 (indlela yenqubomgomo yenkathi ye-RS1).
TweakWhy_LockWidgets: I-Windows Web Experience Pack yengeza amawijethi nokuqukethwe okushukumisayo esikrinini sokukhiya nebha yomsebenzi. Ukukhubaza kususa lezi.
TweakWhy_MSIExtractContext: Yengeza inketho ethi Khipha kumenyu yokuqukethwe yokuchofoza kwesokudla yamafayela wesifaki se-.msi, ikuvumela ukuthi uphequlule okuqukethwe kwawo ngaphandle kokusebenzisa isifaki.
TweakWhy_MSNetClient: Iklayenti le-Microsoft Networks elivumela le PC ukuthi ifinyelele amafayela namaphrinta abiwe ngamanye amakhompyutha e-Windows kunethiwekhi. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_MaintenanceWakeUp: IWindows ingavusa i-PC yakho ekulaleni ubusuku bonke ukuze iqhube imisebenzi yokulungisa okuzenzakalelayo. Ukukhubaza kuvimbela ukuvuka kwasebusuku okungafuneki.
TweakWhy_MapUpdates: I-Windows Maps ingadawuniloda ngokuzenzakalelayo idatha yemephu engaxhunyiwe ku-inthanethi ebuyekeziwe ngemuva. Ukukhubaza kulondoloza umkhawulokudonsa uma ungasebenzisi uhlelo lokusebenza lwe-Maps.
TweakWhy_MergeConflicts: Ibonisa isixwayiso lapho uhlanganisa amafolda aqukethe amafayela anegama elifanayo. Khubaza ukubhala phezu kwamafayela buthule ngaphandle kokwaziswa.
TweakWhy_Microphone: I-Master toggle elawula ukuthi izinhlelo zokusebenza zingakucela yini ukufinyelela kumakrofoni yakho. Ukukhubaza kuvimbela zonke izinhlelo zokusebenza ekusebenziseni imakrofoni. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_MostUsedApps: Ibonisa izinhlelo zakho zokusebenza ezivame ukwethulwa phezulu ohlwini lohlelo lokusebenza lwemenyu yokuqala ukuze ufinyelele ngokushesha.
TweakWhy_MouseAcceleration: Thuthukisa I-Pointer Precision sikala ukunyakaza kwegundane ngokusekelwe kusivinini. Ukukhubaza kunikeza isilinganiso esingu-1:1 sokufaka okungavuthiwe esikhethwa abadlali abaqhudelanayo be-FPS ngenjongo efanayo.
TweakWhy_MultiplaneOverlay: Isici sokuhlanganisa i-GPU esingathuthukisa ukusebenza. Ukukhubaza kungalungisa amaphutha okubukwayo noma ukucwayiza kokunye ukulungiselelwa kwesibonisi.
TweakWhy_MultipleInvokeContext: Lapho ukhetha amafayela ayi-15 noma ngaphezulu futhi uchofoza kwesokudla, iWindows ivame ukubonisa isixwayiso ngaphambi kokubonisa imenyu yokuqukethwe. Lokhu kuphakamisa noma kususa lowo mkhawulo.
TweakWhy_NCSIProbe: Inkomba Yesimo Sokuxhumaniseka Kwenethiwekhi ihlola ukuxhumeka ngokucindezela amaseva e-Microsoft. Ukukhubaza kungase kubonise izithonjana zesimo senethiwekhi ezingalungile. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_NTFSLastAccess: Ibuyekeza isitembu sesikhathi kuwo wonke ifayela isikhathi ngasinye lapho lifundwa. Ukukhubaza kunciphisa umsebenzi wokubhala kwediski kumasistimu anamafayela amaningi amancane afundwayo.
TweakWhy_NTFSLongPaths: Isusa umkhawulo wezinhlamvu ezingu-260 ezindleleni zefayela. Iyadingeka kwamanye amathuluzi okuthuthukisa kanye nezakhiwo zefolda ezifakwe ngokujulile.
TweakWhy_NaglesAlgorithm: Yehlisa ukubhafa kwenethiwekhi ukuze amaphakethe athunyelwe ngokushesha. Ingehlisa ukubambezeleka kubadlali abaningi abaqhudelanayo, kodwa ingase ithinte ukuzinza kokuxhumeka kwamanye amanethiwekhi. Khubaza uma ubona ukwehla kokuxhumana.
TweakWhy_NavPaneAllFolders: Ibonisa wonke amafolda endawo kuhlanganise namafolda esistimu afihliwe kufasitelana lokuzula kwesokunxele le-Explorer.
TweakWhy_NavPaneLibraries: Ikhombisa ingxenye Yemitapo yolwazi (Imibhalo, Umculo, Izithombe, Amavidiyo) kufasitelana lokuzula elingakwesokunxele.
TweakWhy_NavigationPaneExpand: Ifasitelana lokuzulazula le-Explorer liyakhula ngokuzenzakalelayo bese liyaskrola ukuze ligqamise ifolda oyibukayo njengamanje.
TweakWhy_NetBIOS: I-NetBIOS iyiphrothokholi yokuxazulula amagama endala esetshenziselwa ukwaba ifayela le-Windows. Ukukhubaza amanethiwekhi esimanje kunciphisa ithrafikhi yokusakaza engadingekile. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_NetDevicesAutoInst: Ilawula ukuthi i-Windows ilanda ngokuzenzakalelayo futhi ifake izishayeli zamadivaysi enethiwekhi asanda kuxhunywa.
TweakWhy_NetworkAdaptersSavePower: Ivumela iWindows ukuthi ibeke ama-adaptha enethiwekhi esimweni samandla aphansi uma ingenzi lutho. Ukukhubaza kuvimbela ukubambezeleka okufushane kokuphinda kuxhunywe ngemva kokuvuka kwe-adaptha.
TweakWhy_NetworkDiscovery: Inika amandla le PC ukuthi ithole amanye amadivayisi kunethiwekhi yendawo futhi ibonakale kubo. Iyadingeka ukuze uphequlule ukwabelana kwenethiwekhi ku-File Explorer. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_NetworkFromLockScreen: Ilawula ukuthi inkinobho yokukhetha inethiwekhi iyabonakala yini esikrinini sokukhiya ngaphambi kokuthi umsebenzisi angene ngemvume.
TweakWhy_NetworkProtection: Ukuvikelwa kwenethiwekhi ye-Microsoft Defender kuvimbela ukuxhumeka ezizindeni eziyingozi ezaziwayo namakheli e-IP ezingeni lenethiwekhi. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_NewAppPrompt: Uma uzama ukuvula uhlobo lwefayela olunganxulwanga, Windows ikhombisa ingxoxo ebuza ukuthi livulwe kanjani. Ukuyicisha kucindezela lo mbuzo.
TweakWhy_NewOutlook: Ilawula ukuthi uhlelo lokusebenza olusha lwe-Outlook luyatholakala yini. Khubaza ukuze uqhubeke usebenzisa izinhlelo zokusebenza ze-Imeyili nekhalenda esikhundleni salokho.
TweakWhy_Notifications: Iswishi eyinhloko yalo lonke uhlelo lwezaziso lwe-Windows. Ukukhubaza kumisa zonke izaziso zohlelo lokusebenza futhi kufihle isikhungo sezaziso. Lolu wushintsho olunobungozi obukhulu okungenzeka kube nzima noma kungenzeki ukuluhlehlisa.
TweakWhy_NumLock: Ilawula ukuthi ukhiye we-Num Lock uyavulwa ngokuzenzakalelayo uma iWindows iqala. Nika amandla ukuqala njalo ngephedi yezinombolo esebenzayo.
TweakWhy_OneDrive: Ifaka iklayenti lokuvumelanisa ledeskithophu ye-OneDrive, noma isusa uhlelo lokusebenza kanye nokuhlanganiswa kwayo kwe-Explorer. Ukukhipha kuwukugeleza komsebenzi wokukhipha iphakheji, hhayi ukuguqula okulula, futhi ukuyibuyisela kungase kudinge ukusetha kabusha, ukungena ngemvume futhi, nokulinda ukuvumelanisa ukuthi kuphinde kutholakale.
TweakWhy_OneDriveFileExplorerAd: I-OneDrive ibonisa isaziso sokuphromotha ngaphakathi kwe-File Explorer esikukhuthaza ukuba uvumelanise amafayela. Ukucasha kususa lesi sibhengezo.
TweakWhy_OpenFileExplorerTo: Isetha indawo ezenzakalelayo I-File Explorer evula kuyo lapho yethulwa kubha yomsebenzi noma i-Start Menu.
TweakWhy_PUAppsDetection: Inika amandla i-Defender ukuthi ithole futhi ifake ekwarantini izinhlelo ezingase zingafuneki ezifana ne-adware, bundleware, kanye nabathumbi besiphequluli. Lolu shintsho lunengozi emaphakathi futhi lungathinta eminye imisebenzi.
TweakWhy_PerformanceTuning: Isebenzisa isethi yokulungiselelwa kwesistimu yefa kanye nokulungiswa kokulungiselelwa kokuqalisa ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukuphendula okuvamile kwesistimu. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_PowerPlan: Isetha uhlelo lwamandla lwe-Windows. Balanced ilinganisa ukusebenza ngokuya ngomthwalo. High Performance igcina i-CPU isesimweni sesivinini esiphezulu. Ultimate Performance isusa konke ukunciphisa okonga amandla ukuze kufezwe ukugeleza okuphezulu. Ultimate Performance kungenzeka ingatholakali kuzo zonke izinhlelo.
TweakWhy_PowerShellModulesLogging: Ifaka wonke umyalo oqhutshwa amamojula we-PowerShell kulogi yomcimbi we-Windows. Iwusizo ekuhloleni ukuphepha nasekuphenyeni izigameko.
TweakWhy_PowerShellScriptsLogging: Ifaka okuqukethwe okugcwele kwawo wonke amabhlokhi weskripthi se-PowerShell asebenza kulogu lomcimbi we-Windows. Isiza ngophenyo lwangemva kwesigameko.
TweakWhy_Powershell7Telemetry: I-PowerShell 7 ithumela idatha yokusetshenziswa engaziwa ku-Microsoft ngokuzenzakalelayo. Ikhubaza ukuphuma kule telemetry. Ixhunywe kunketho ethi Faka/Buyekeza i-PowerShell 7.
TweakWhy_PreventEdgeShortcutCreation: Imisa iMicrosoft Edge ekwenzeni kabusha isinqamuleli sayo sedeskithophu ngemva kwezibuyekezo. Isebenza kuzo zonke iziteshi zokukhishwa kwe-Edge.
TweakWhy_PrintCMDContext: Ibonisa noma ifihla inketho yokuphrinta kumenyu yokuqukethwe yokuchofoza kwesokudla kumafayela ombhalo we-.bat kanye ne-.cmd.
TweakWhy_ProtectClickOnce: Ikhubaza ukwaziswa kwe-ClickOnce ukwethemba kuzo zonke izindawo zokuphepha. Ivimbela izinhlelo zokusebenza ze-ClickOnce ezingathenjwa ukuthi ziyalelwe ukufakwa. Lolu wushintsho olunobungozi obukhulu okungenzeka kube nzima noma kungenzeki ukuluhlehlisa.
TweakWhy_ProtectFileSystemPerformance: Ikhubaza ukukhiqizwa kwegama lefayela elifushane elingu-8.3 ku-NTFS. Ithuthukisa ukusebenza kwesistimu yefayela futhi isuse isici esihambisanayo sefa esingadingeki kangako namuhla.
TweakWhy_ProtectMSOffice: Ikhawulela amamakhro, ukusetshenziswa kokuqukethwe kwangaphandle, nezilungiselelo zokwethenjwa ze-Outlook kuzo zonke izinguqulo ze-Office. Yehlisa ama-vector okuhlasela asekelwe kumadokhumenti. Lolu wushintsho olunobungozi obukhulu okungenzeka kube nzima noma kungenzeki ukuluhlehlisa.
TweakWhy_ProtectMSOfficeLinks: Ivimbela i-Word ekuvuseleleni ngokuzenzakalelayo izixhumanisi zangaphandle kumadokhumenti nama-imeyili. Yehlisa ubungozi bokukhishwa kwedatha ngezixhumanisi zedokhumenti eshunyekiwe. Lolu wushintsho olunobungozi obukhulu okungenzeka kube nzima noma kungenzeki ukuluhlehlisa.
TweakWhy_ProtectOS: Isebenzisa isethi ebanzi yamanani okuqinisa okubhalisa afaka ukuvikelwa kokuqinisekisa, i-UAC, i-NTLM, i-TCP/IP, nokuziphatha kokukhishwa kwekhadi elihlakaniphile. Lolu wushintsho olunobungozi obukhulu okungenzeka kube nzima noma kungenzeki ukuluhlehlisa.
TweakWhy_ProtectRPCSurface: Ikhubaza i-RPC-over-TCP Yesihleli Semisebenzi kanye Nesilawuli Sokulawula Isevisi esikude. Yehlisa ukuchayeka ezindleleni zokuhlasela zabaphathi berimothi. Lolu wushintsho olunobungozi obukhulu okungenzeka kube nzima noma kungenzeki ukuluhlehlisa.
TweakWhy_ProtectWinRM: Ikhubaza ithrafikhi ye-WinRM engabetheliwe kanye nokuqinisekiswa kwe-digest, bese iqalisa kabusha isevisi ye-WinRM. Iqinisekisa ukuthi ukuxhumeka kokuphatha okukude kuhlala kubethelwe. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_PrtScnSnippingTool: Yenza ukhiye we-Print Screen uvule i-Snipping Tool ukuze uthwebule isikrini ngokuhlanganyela esikhundleni sokukopisha buthule ebhodini lokunamathisela.
TweakWhy_QoS: Isihleli sephakethe Lekhwalithi Yesevisi singabeka kuqala izinhlobo ezithile zethrafikhi yenethiwekhi. Kuyadingeka ukuze ezinye izici zenethiwekhi ye-QoS zisebenze kahle.
TweakWhy_QuickAccessFrequentFolders: Ingxenye ethi Ukufinyelela Ngokushesha ku-Explorer ingabonisa amafolda avakashelwa njalo. Fihla ukuze ugcine Ukufinyelela Okusheshayo kubonisa kuphela amafolda akho aphiniwe.
TweakWhy_QuickAccessRecentFiles: Ingxenye ethi Ukufinyelela Okusheshayo ku-Explorer ingabonisa amafayela asanda kuvulwa. Fihla ukuze ugcine Ukufinyelela Okusheshayo kubonisa kuphela amafolda akho aphiniwe.
TweakWhy_RazerBlock: Ivimba imibhalo yesifaki se-Razer Synapse ukuthi isebenze ngokuzenzakalelayo. Ivimbela isofthiwe ye-Razer engafunwa ukuthi ifakwe ngemuva. Lolu wushintsho olunobungozi obukhulu okungenzeka kube nzima noma kungenzeki ukuluhlehlisa.
TweakWhy_RecentFiles: Ilawula ukuthi i-Windows ilandelela yini amafayela asanda kufinyelelwa ukuze iboniswe kokuthi Ukufinyelela Ngokushesha kanye nezingxoxo ezivulekile. Khubaza ukuze umise lokhu kulandelela.
TweakWhy_RecentShortcuts: Ibonisa amafayela namafolda asanda kufinyelelwa navame ukufinyelelwa kuwo njengezinqamuleli esigabeni se-Explorer Quick Access.
TweakWhy_RecentlyAddedApps: Ibonisa uhlu lwezinhlelo zokusebenza ezisanda kufakwa ku-Start Menu. Khubaza ukuze ugcine uhlu lohlelo lokusebenza lwe-Start Menu luhlanzekile.
TweakWhy_RecentlyAddedStartApps: Izinhlelo zokusebenza ezisanda kungezwa kokuthi Qala
TweakWhy_RecommendedTroubleshooting: Ilawula ukuthi iWindows isebenzisa izixazululi zinkinga ngokuzenzakalelayo lapho izinkinga zitholwa. Okuzenzakalelayo kusacela imvume yakho ngaphambi kokuqalisa.
TweakWhy_RecycleBinDeleteConfirmation: Ibonisa umyalo wokuqinisekisa ngaphambi kokuhambisa amafayela ku-Recycle Bin. Nika amandla ukuvimbela ukususwa ngephutha.
TweakWhy_RegistryBackup: Inika amandla isipele sesikhathi esizenzakalelayo samafayela e-hive yokubhalisa ye-Windows kufolda ye-RegBack ngaphakathi kohla lwemibhalo lwe-Windows.
TweakWhy_RepairSharedPrinterConnectionEr: Ilungisa ukwehluleka koxhumano lwephrinta oluvamile nohlangothi lweklayenti ngokuqondisa i-RPC, i-SMB, iphoyinti kanye nokuphrinta, i-spooler, i-TCP, nezilungiselelo zokutholwa kwenethiwekhi. Lolu shintsho luphethe ingozi emaphakathi futhi ludinga ukuqalisa kabusha.
TweakWhy_RepairWindows11SMBUpdateIssue: Ilungisa inkinga eyaziwayo kwabanye Windows 11 yakha lapho ukufinyelela kwesabelo se-SMB kwehluleka khona ngemva kokubuyekezwa ngenxa yenani lokubhalisa elingekho.
TweakWhy_ReservedStorage: I-Windows igcina amagigabhayithi amaningana esikhala sediski ukuze kuvuselelwe, amafayela esikhashana, nezinqolobane. Ukukhubaza kubuyisela lesi sikhala ebesibekiwe ngemva kwesibuyekezo esilandelayo. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_RestartDeviceAfterUpdate: Ivumela i-Windows ukuhlela ukuqalisa kabusha ngokushesha ngemva kokuqeda ukufaka isibuyekezo.
TweakWhy_RestartNotification: Ibonisa isaziso kubha yomsebenzi lapho i-Windows Update isifakiwe futhi idinga ukuqaliswa kabusha ukuze kuqedwe.
TweakWhy_RestoreFldrWindows: Ivula kabusha noma iyiphi ifolda ye-Explorer amawindi abevuliwe ngenkathi ugcina ukuvalwa. Ibuyisela umongo wakho osebenzayo ekungeneni ngakunye.
TweakWhy_RevertStartMenu: Ibuyisela i-Start Menu esakhiweni sangaphambi kwe-24H2 Windows 11 I-24H2 iyakha. Kungase kuthinte ukuhambisana nezibuyekezo ze-Windows zesikhathi esizayo. Lolu wushintsho olunobungozi obukhulu okungenzeka kube nzima noma kungenzeki ukuluhlehlisa.
TweakWhy_S3Sleep: I-S3 ukulala okujulile kwendabuko lapho i-PC inika amandla ngokugcwele izingxenye. Amanye amasistimu azenzakalela Kokubekwe eceleni Kwesimanje okungadonsa amandla ngenkathi engenzi lutho.
TweakWhy_SMB1: I-SMBv1 iyiphrothokholi yokwabelana ngamafayela ephelelwe yisikhathi futhi esengozini eyaziwa ngezenzo ze-EternalBlue. Khubaza ngaphandle uma kudingeka kumadivayisi enethiwekhi amadala kakhulu. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_SMBServer: Inika amandla ingxenye yeseva yefayela le-SMB evumela amanye amakhompyutha kunethiwekhi ukuthi afinyelele kumafolda abelwe namaphrinta kule PC. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_SaveRestartableApps: I-Windows ingalondoloza isimo sezinhlelo zokusebenza ezivuliwe lapho uphuma futhi iphinde izivule ngokuzenzakalelayo ngemva kokungena kwakho ngemvume okulandelayo.
TweakWhy_SaveZoneInformation: Uma ulanda ifayela ku-inthanethi, iWindows ilimaka ngomaka wendawo. Ukugcina lokhu kunikwe amandla kuvumela izexwayiso zokuphepha lapho usebenzisa amafayela alandiwe.
TweakWhy_ScheduledTasks: Imisebenzi eminingana ehleliwe isebenza ngemuva ukuze iqoqe futhi ilayishe idatha yokuxilonga. Ukukhubaza kumisa le misebenzi ukuthi isebenze ngokuzenzakalelayo. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_SearchAppInStore: Uma uvula ifayela elinesandiso esingaziwa, iWindows ingaphakamisa ukuthi ulibheke Esitolo seMicrosoft. Ukukhubaza kweqa lesi siphakamiso.
TweakWhy_SelectCheckboxes: Yengeza amabhokisi okuhlola eduze kwamafayela namafolda ku-Explorer ukuze kube lula ukukhetha okuningi ngaphandle kokudinga ukubamba u-Ctrl.
TweakWhy_Sensors: Ilawula ukufinyelela kuma-sensor e-hardware afana ne-accelerometer, gyroscope, kanye ne-sensor yokukhanya okuzungezile. Kubaluleke kakhulu kumathebulethi nakumadivayisi aguqukayo.
TweakWhy_ServicesManual: Isetha ukukhethwa kwezinsizakalo ze-Windows ezingabalulekile ukusuka ku-Othomathikhi ukuya ekuqaliseni mathupha. Izinsizakalo zisazoqala ngokufunwa lapho kudingeka. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_SetDLLHijackingPrevention: Ilungiselela i-oda losesho le-DLL Yesiphathi Sesikhathi ukuze uvimbele izinhlelo zokusebenza ekulayisheni ama-DLL asuka ezindaweni ezingathenjwa. Ivala indlela evamile yokulethwa kwe-malware. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_SetDefenderExploitGuardPolicy: Isebenzisa imithetho eyengeziwe yokunciphisa indawo yokuhlaselwa kwe-Exploit Guard nge-Windows Defender ukuvimba amasu avamile ohlelo olungayilungele ikhompuyutha. Lolu wushintsho olunobungozi obukhulu okungenzeka kube nzima noma kungenzeki ukuluhlehlisa.
TweakWhy_SetLOLBinFirewallRules: Yengeza imithetho ye-firewall ephumayo kumabhinari akhelwe ngaphakathi e-Windows avame ukuhlukunyezwa uhlelo olungayilungele ikhompuyutha (LOLBins) ukuze ashayele ucingo ekhaya noma alande okulayishiwe. Lolu wushintsho olunobungozi obukhulu okungenzeka kube nzima noma kungenzeki ukuluhlehlisa.
TweakWhy_SetNtpServerOverride: Ikhipha i-Windows Time ukuze isebenzise i-pool.ntp.org esikhundleni seseva yesikhathi ye-Windows.
TweakWhy_SetSMBSharingCompatibility: Ilondoloza ukulungiselelwa kokwabelana kwe-SMB okukhona kakade kanye nemininingwane egciniwe yenethiwekhi lapho okunye ukulungiswa kwenethiwekhi kusetshenziswa. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_SetWindowsFirewallLogging: Inika amandla ukuloga kokuxhumeka okuwisiwe nokuvunyelwe kufayela lokungena le-Windows Firewall ukuze ukwazi ukuhlola umsebenzi wenethiwekhi.
TweakWhy_SettingsSuggestedContent: Uhlelo lokusebenza Lwezilungiselelo lungabonisa iziphakamiso ezixhasiwe namathiphu eduze kwezilungiselelo zakho. Ukufihla kususa lokhu okuqukethwe kokuphromotha.
TweakWhy_ShareMenu: Yengeza inketho yokwabelana kumenyu yokuqukethwe yokuchofoza kwesokudla yamafayela, ikuvumela ukuthi wabelane ngawo ngezinhlelo zokusebenza noma ukwabelana okuseduze kwe-Windows.
TweakWhy_SharedExperiences: Ivumela i-Windows ukwabelana ngomsebenzi phakathi kwamadivayisi akho nge-akhawunti yakho ye-Microsoft. Ukukhubaza kugcina umsebenzi usendaweni kulo mshini kuphela.
TweakWhy_SharingMappedDrives: Ivumela amadrayivu enethiwekhi afakwe kumephu ukuthi abonakale ezinqubweni eziphakeme (zomlawuli) kanye nomsebenzisi ongene ngemvume wamanje. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_SharingWizard: Inika amandla isilekeleli sokwabelana ngamafayela enziwe lula uma uchofoza kwesokudla ifayela noma ifolda bese ukhetha ukwabelana ngayo.
TweakWhy_ShortcutArrow: Ibonisa noma ifihle isithonjana sembondela yomcibisholo omncane kumafayela ezinqamuleli ukubonisa ukuthi ayizinqamuleli hhayi amafayela asekuqaleni.
TweakWhy_ShortcutsSuffix: Ilawula ukuthi i-Windows iyengeza yini - Isinqamuleli egameni lezinqamuleli ezintsha ezidalwe kudeskithophu.
TweakWhy_ShutdownFromLockScreen: Ilawula ukuthi izinkinobho zokuvala nokuqalisa kabusha ziyabonakala yini esikrinini sokukhiya i-Windows.
TweakWhy_SigninInfo: Isebenzisa imininingwane yakho yokungena ngemvume ukuze iqedele ukusetha iphrofayili yakho ngemva kokuvuselelwa kwe-Windows. Khubaza ukuze uthole ubumfihlo obuningi.
TweakWhy_SleepButton: Ilawula ukuthi inketho yokulala iyavela yini ku-Start Menu nokuthi inkinobho yekhibhodi yokulala iyasebenza yini.
TweakWhy_SleepTimeout: Ilawula ukuthi isibonisi sicishwa nini nalapho i-PC ingena kumodi yokulala ngemva kokungasebenzi. Khubaza ukuze uvimbele ukulala okuzenzakalelayo.
TweakWhy_SnapAssist: Uma uthwebula iwindi ohlangothini olulodwa, iWindows iphakamisa amanye amawindi avuliwe ukuze agcwalise isikhala esisele. Khubaza ukuthwebula ngaphandle kweziphakamiso.
TweakWhy_StandbyFix: I-Modern Standby (S0) ingabangela i-CPU ephezulu kanye nokusetshenziswa kwamandla ngenkathi i-PC ibonakala ilele. Lokhu kulungisa kushintshela ekuziphatheni kokulala okujulile kwesitayela se-S3.
TweakWhy_StartAccountNotifications: I-Microsoft ingabonisa izaziso ezihlobene ne-akhawunti kanye nemiyalelo ku-Start Menu. Ukucasha kususa lezi.
TweakWhy_StartLayout: Ilawula isilinganiso sesakhiwo se-Windows 11 Qala Imenyu phakathi kwezinhlelo zokusebenza eziphiniwe nokuqukethwe okunconyiwe.
TweakWhy_StartRecommendationsTips: Imenyu Yokuqala ingabonisa amathiphu mayelana nezici ze-Windows nezincomo zezinhlelo zokusebenza ezintsha. Ukucasha kususa lezi ziphakamiso.
TweakWhy_StartRecommendedSection: Ibonisa noma ifihle ingxenye Enconyiwe ezansi kokuthi Qala Imenyu. Kuma-edishini e-Enterprise and Education lokhu kungafihlwa ngenqubomgomo.
TweakWhy_StartupSound: Idlala i-chime yokuqalisa ye-Windows lapho ideskithophu ilayisha ngemva kokungena ngemvume.
TweakWhy_StickyShift: Ukucindezela u-Shift izikhathi ezinhlanu ngokushesha kubangela ingxoxo yokufinyeleleka Okhiye Abanamathelayo. Khubaza ukuze uvimbele lokhu ekuphazamiseni umsebenzi wakho.
TweakWhy_StorageSense: Ikhulula ngokuzenzakalelayo isikhala sediski kushejuli ngokususa amafayela esikhashana, ukulanda okudala, kanye nokuqukethwe kwe-Recycle Bin.
TweakWhy_SuperHiddenFiles: Ibonisa amafayela esistimu ye-Windows avikelwe ku-File Explorer. Lokhu kufihlwa ngokuzenzakalela ukuze kuvinjelwe ukuguqulwa noma ukususwa ngephutha.
TweakWhy_Superfetch: I-SysMain ilayisha kuqala izinhlelo zokusebenza ezisetshenziswa njalo ku-RAM ukusheshisa izikhathi zokuqalisa. Kuma-SSD inikeza inzuzo encane futhi ngokuvamile ingakhutshazwa ngokuphephile. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_SuspendAirstrikeAttack: Ifihla i-UI yokukhetha inethiwekhi esikrinini sokukhiya i-Windows. Ivimbela ukushintsha izilungiselelo zenethiwekhi ngaphambi kokungena ngemvume. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte ukugeleza komsebenzi okuthile.
TweakWhy_SyncNotifications: I-OneDrive nabanye abahlinzeki bokuvumelanisa bangabonisa izaziso zokuphromotha ngaphakathi kwe-Explorer. Khubaza ukufihla lezi zibhengezo.
TweakWhy_TailoredExperiences: Isebenzisa idatha yakho yokuxilonga ukuze ibonise amathiphu omuntu siqu, izikhangiso, nezincomo ezivela ku-Microsoft. Ukukhubaza kukukhipha.
TweakWhy_TaskManagerDetails: Ivula Isiphathi Somsebenzi ngokuqondile kuthebhu Yemininingwane ebonisa zonke izinqubo esikhundleni sokubuka isifinyezo esenziwe lula.
TweakWhy_TaskbarEndTask: Engeza Qeda Umsebenzi kumenyu yokuqukethwe yebha yomsebenzi
TweakWhy_Teredo: I-Teredo iyiphrothokholi yomhubhe ehlinzeka ngoxhumo lwe-IPv6 ngamanethiwekhi e-IPv4. Iyadingeka ekuxhumekeni kwe-Xbox Live nezinye izinhlelo zokusebenza zontanga kuya kontanga. Lolu wushintsho olunobungozi obukhulu okungenzeka kube nzima noma kungenzeki ukuluhlehlisa.
TweakWhy_ThisPC: Ibonisa noma ifihla lesi sithonjana se-PC kudeskithophu yakho ukuze ufinyelele ngokushesha kumadrayivu namadivayisi.
TweakWhy_ThumbnailCache: IWindows igcina izithonjana zokubuka kuqala kufayela lesizindalwazi elifihliwe ukuze kusheshiswe ukuphequlula kwefolda. Ukukhubaza kuvimbela le cache ukuthi igcinwe kudiski.
TweakWhy_Thumbnails: Ibonisa ukuhlola kuqala kwesithombe nevidiyo njengezithonjana ku-Explorer esikhundleni sezithonjana zohlobo lwefayela elijwayelekile. Ukukhubaza kubonisa izithonjana kuphela.
TweakWhy_ThumbsDBOnNetwork: I-Windows idala amafayela e-Thumbs.db afihliwe ekwabelweni kwenethiwekhi ukuze agcine izithonjana. Ukukhubaza kuvimbela lawa mafayela ukuthi enziwe ezindaweni zenethiwekhi.
TweakWhy_TitleBarColor: Imibala yamabha esihloko sewindi ukuze ifane nombala wakho we-Windows we-accent esikhundleni sokuwabonisa emhlophe qwa noma empunga.
TweakWhy_TrayIcons: Ibonisa zonke izithonjana zendawo yezaziso kuthreyi yesistimu esikhundleni sokufihla izithonjana ezichichimayo ngemva komcibisholo wokunweba.
TweakWhy_UWPAccountInfo: Ilawula ukuthi izinhlelo zokusebenza ze-UWP zingafinyelela yini igama le-akhawunti yakho, isithombe, nolunye ulwazi lwe-akhawunti.
TweakWhy_UWPApps: Ivula ibhokisi lokukhetha ukususa noma ukubuyisela izinhlelo zokusebenza ezikhethiwe zeSitolo Se-Windows. Okunye ukususwa kuyindlela eyodwa, futhi ngisho nezindlela zokubuyisela ezisekelwayo zisengadinga iSitolo se-Microsoft, iwinethi, noma ukulandelwa kokufakwa kabusha okwenziwa ngesandla. Lona umsebenzi wephakheji onobungozi obukhulu kunokuguqula okulula.
TweakWhy_UWPCalendar: Ilawula ukuthi izinhlelo zokusebenza ze-UWP zingakwazi ukufunda nokubhala kudatha yakho yekhalenda.
TweakWhy_UWPCallHistory: Ilawula ukuthi izinhlelo zokusebenza ze-UWP ziyakwazi ukufunda umlando wakho wekholi.
TweakWhy_UWPContacts: Ilawula ukuthi izinhlelo zokusebenza ze-UWP zingafinyelela yini ohlwini lwakho loxhumana nabo.
TweakWhy_UWPDiagInfo: Ilawula ukuthi izinhlelo zokusebenza ze-UWP zingaqoqa yini ulwazi lokuxilonga mayelana nedivayisi yakho nesimo sayo.
TweakWhy_UWPEmail: Ilawula ukuthi izinhlelo zokusebenza ze-UWP zingakwazi yini ukufunda futhi zikuthumelele i-imeyili.
TweakWhy_UWPFileSystem: Ilawula ukuthi izinhlelo zokusebenza ze-UWP zingakwazi yini ukufinyelela amafayela noma yikuphi kusistimu yakho yefayela ngale kwamafolda azo ezinhlelo zokusebenza. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_UWPMessaging: Ilawula ukuthi izinhlelo zokusebenza ze-UWP ziyakwazi ukufunda futhi zithumele imilayezo yombhalo.
TweakWhy_UWPNotifications: Ilawula ukuthi izinhlelo ze‑UWP zingakwazi yini ukuthumela izaziso esikhungweni sezaziso se‑Windows.
TweakWhy_UWPOtherDevices: Ilawula ukuthi izinhlelo zokusebenza ze-UWP zingafinyelela yini kwamanye amadivayisi amatanisiwe angamboziwe izigaba ezicaciswe kakhulu.
TweakWhy_UWPPhoneCalls: Ilawula ukuthi izinhlelo zokusebenza ze-UWP zingenza futhi zilawule amakholi wefoni.
TweakWhy_UWPRadios: Ilawula ukuthi izinhlelo zokusebenza ze-UWP zingakwazi yini ukulawula i-Bluetooth namanye amadivaysi omsakazo angenantambo.
TweakWhy_UWPSwapFile: Ifayela lokushintshanisa le-UWP (swapfile.sys) lisetshenziswa izinhlelo zokusebenza zeSitolo se-Windows ekuphegeni inkumbulo ebonakalayo. Ukukhubaza kukhulula isikhala sediski uma ungasebenzisi izinhlelo zokusebenza zeSitolo. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_UWPTasks: Ilawula ukuthi izinhlelo zokusebenza ze-UWP zingafinyelela yini umsebenzi wakho nohlu lwezinto okufanele uzenze.
TweakWhy_UWPVoiceActivation: Ilawula ukuthi izinhlelo zokusebenza ze-UWP zingenziwa zisebenze kusetshenziswa imiyalo yezwi ngemuva.
TweakWhy_UnknownNetworks: Isetha iphrofayela yenethiwekhi ezenzakalelayo esetshenziswa ekuxhumekeni kwenethiwekhi entsha noma engaziwa lapho etholwa okokuqala. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_UpdateAdobereaderDCSTIG: Isebenzisa isethi yezilungiselelo zenqubomgomo yezokuphepha ye-Adobe Reader DC okuhlanganisa imodi evikelwe, ukubuka okuvikelekile, nokukhubaza izici zamafu newebhu. Lolu wushintsho olunobungozi obukhulu okungenzeka kube nzima noma kungenzeki ukuluhlehlisa.
TweakWhy_UpdateAutoDownload: Ilawula ukuthi i-Windows Update izilanda ngokuzenzakalelayo izibuyekezo ngemuva. Ukukhubaza kukuvumela ukuthi ukhethe ukuthi uzilanda nini izibuyekezo. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_UpdateCipherSuites: Isetha ama-suite e-SCHANNEL cipher athandwayo kuya kwezinhlobonhlobo eziqinile ze-AES-256 ne-AES-128. Iqinisekisa ukubethela okuqinile kwakho konke ukuxhumana kwe-TLS. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_UpdateDesktopRegistry: Isusa isithonjana solwazi oluncane oluvela kudeskithophu lapho izithombe zangemuva ze-Windows Spotlight zisebenza.
TweakWhy_UpdateDotNetStrongAuth: Iphoqa i-.NET Framework 4.x kanye no-2.x ukusebenzisa i-TLS ezenzakalelayo yesistimu kanye ne-cryptography eqinile. Ivimbela izinhlelo zokusebenza ze-.NET ezindala kusukela ekubuyeleni kuma-ciphers abuthakathaka. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_UpdateDriver: Ilawula ukuthi i-Windows Update ilanda ngokuzenzakalelayo futhi ifake izishayeli zehadiwe. Ukukhubaza kukuvumela ukuthi uphathe abashayeli mathupha. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_UpdateEventLogSize: Ikhuphula ilogu yomcimbi Wokuphepha we-Windows umkhawulo kasayizi ube ngu-1 MB. Isiza ukugcina imicimbi eminingi yocwaningo ngaphambi kokuba okufakiwe okudala kubhalwe phezu.
TweakWhy_UpdateKeyExchanges: Inika amandla ama-algorithms okushintshanisa ukhiye we-Diffie-Hellman, ECDH, kanye ne-PKCS ku-SCHANNEL. Iqinisekisa ukushintshaniswa kokhiye ovikeleke phambili kuyatholakala ekuxhumekeni kwe-TLS. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_UpdateMSProducts: Uma inikwe amandla, i-Windows Update iphinde ihlole ukubuyekezwa kweminye imikhiqizo ye-Microsoft efana ne-Office. Ikhubaza ukubuyekezwa kwemikhawulo ku-Windows kuphela.
TweakWhy_UpdateMSRT: Ilawula ukuthi i-Windows Update inikeza ukuskena kweThuluzi Lokukhipha Okunonya. Ukukhubaza kuyivimbela ekuphushweni nge-Windows Update. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_UpdateMicrosoftProducts: Uma inikwe amandla, i-Windows Update iphinde ihlole futhi ifake izibuyekezo zezinye isofthiwe ye-Microsoft efakiwe kanye nezibuyekezo ze-Windows.
TweakWhy_UpdatePowershell: I-PowerShell 7 iyigobolondo lesimanje le-cross-platform elinokusebenza okuthuthukisiwe nezici ngaphezu kwe-Windows PowerShell 5.1 eyakhelwe ngaphakathi. Ixhunywe ku-PS7 Telemetry toggle.
TweakWhy_UpdateProtocols: I-TLS 1.0 kanye ne-1.1 yehlisiwe ngobungozi obaziwayo. Ukuzikhubaza kwenza isistimu ibhekane ne-BEAST, POODLE, nokuhlasela okuhlobene. Ukunika amandla kabusha kufanele kwenziwe kuphela ukuze kuhambisane nefa.
TweakWhy_UpdateRegistryPaths: Idala noma yiziphi izindlela zokubhalisa ezingekho ezidingwa amanye ama-tweaks aqinile ngaphambi kokuthi zisebenze. Lesi isinyathelo esidingekayo esingenawo umthelela obhekene nomsebenzisi obonakalayo.
TweakWhy_UpdateRestart: Ivimbela iWindows ukuthi iqalise kabusha ngokuzenzakalelayo ngemva kokufaka izibuyekezo ngaphandle kokufaka kwakho. Ikunikeza ukulawula lapho ukuqalisa phansi kwenzeka.
TweakWhy_UseStoreOpenWith: Ibonisa noma ifihle okuthi Bheka uhlelo lokusebenza kunketho Yesitolo se-Microsoft evela engxoxweni ethi Vula Ngezinhlobo zamafayela angahlobene.
TweakWhy_VerboseStatus: Ibonisa imilayezo yesimo enemininingwane ngesikhathi sokuqalwa kwe-Windows nokuvala shaqa esikhundleni sesipina sokulayisha esijwayelekile.
TweakWhy_VisualFX: Ilawula isilungiselelo semiphumela yokubukwayo iyonke. Ukusebenza kukhubaza ukugqwayiza ukuze kube nokuzwakala kwe-snappier. Ukubukeka kunika amandla yonke imiphumela.
TweakWhy_WAPPush: Isevisi ye-WAP Push yemiyalezo ithola imilayezo emoyeni evela kubathwali beselula. Ayidingeki kwi-PC engaxhumekile kunethiwekhi yeselula.
TweakWhy_WPBT: I-WPBT ithebula le-firmware elivumela abakhiqizi ukuthi basebenzise isoftware ngesikhathi sokuqalisa iWindows. Ukukhubaza kuvimbela izinto ezisebenzisekayo ezijovwe ngumkhiqizi ukuthi zisebenze ngokuzenzakalelayo. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_WebLangList: Ivumelanisa uhlu lwakho lolimi oluncamelayo kuseva ye-Microsoft ukuze okuqukethwe kwewebhu kuhambisane nezintandokazi zakho. Khubaza ukuze uthole ubumfihlo obuningi.
TweakWhy_WebSearch: Ihlanganisa imiphumela yewebhu ye-Bing kubha yokusesha ye-Windows. Ukukhubaza kwenza ukusesha kwesistimu kubonise amafayela endawo kuphela nezilungiselelo.
TweakWhy_WhatsNewInWindows: Ibonisa izibhengezo kanye nokwaziswa okugqamisa izici ezintsha ze-Windows ngemva kokubuyekezwa. Khubaza ukuze ucindezele lezi zaziso.
TweakWhy_WiFiSense: I-WiFi Sense ingabelana ngokuzenzakalelayo ngephasiwedi yakho ye-WiFi noxhumana nabo. Ukukhubaza kuvimbela lokhu kuziphatha kokwabelana.
TweakWhy_Win32LongPathLimit: Isusa umkhawulo wendlela yefayela enezinhlamvu ezingu-260 ezinhlelweni zokusebenza ze-Win32. Kuyadingeka kwamanye amathuluzi okuthuthukisa kanye nezakhiwo zefolda eziyinkimbinkimbi.
TweakWhy_WindowsCapabilities: Ivula ingxoxo yezici ozikhethela yona ukuze wengeze noma ususe amakhono e-Windows njengamaphekhi olimi noma amathuluzi e-RSAT. Ukuthola kabusha kungase kudinge ukufinyelela kwe-Windows Update, amafayela omthombo, noma ukuqalisa kabusha ukulandela, ngakho-ke lokhu kufanele kuthathwe njengokuphathwa kwephakheji kunokuguqula okulula.
TweakWhy_WindowsColorMode: Isetha ukuthi igobolondo le-Windows (ibha yomsebenzi, i-Start Menu, isikhungo sesenzo) lisebenzisa Imodi Emnyama noma Ekhanyayo.
TweakWhy_WindowsFeatures: Ivula noma vala ibhokisi lokuvula izici ze-Windows ukuze unike amandla noma ukhubaze izingxenye ze-Windows ozikhethele njenge-Hyper-V noma i-Telnet. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_WindowsGameMode: Lokhu kulawula isilungiselelo se-Windows Imodi Yomdlalo esakhelwe ngaphakathi, hhayi ukuhamba komsebenzi kwephrofayili yeGaming yeBaseline. Windows Imodi Yomdlalo ibeka phambili izinqubo zemidlalo futhi icindezele umsebenzi ongemuva. Abanye abasebenzisi bayayivala ukuze kube nokuzinza kokusakaza noma kokurekhoda, ngoba izinguquko zokubaluleka zingadala ukwehla kwe-encoder.
TweakWhy_WindowsLatestUpdate: Ibhalisa le-PC ukuze ithole izibuyekezo ze-Windows ngokushesha nje lapho zikhishwa kunokulinda ukukhishwa kancane kancane. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.
TweakWhy_WindowsManageDefaultPrinter: Ivumela iWindows ukuthi isethe ngokuzenzakalelayo iphrinta yakho esanda kusetshenziswa njengemisiwe. Ukukhubaza kugcina iphrinta yakho emisiwe oyikhethe ngesandla ilungisiwe.
TweakWhy_WindowsSandbox: Umshini obonakalayo ongasindi ohlukanisiwe wokuqalisa ngokuphephile izinhlelo zokusebenza ezingathenjwa ngaphandle kokufaka isistimu yakho eyinhloko engozini. Idinga iWindows Pro noma ngaphezulu.
TweakWhy_WindowsScriptHost: Ilawula ukuthi iWindows ingakwazi yini ukusebenzisa amafayela weskripthi we-.vbs kanye ne-.js. Ukukhubaza kuvimbela lezi zinhlobo zeskripthi ekusebenziseni uma kuchofozwa kabili. Lolu shintsho luphethe ubungozi obumaphakathi futhi lungase luthinte okunye ukugeleza komsebenzi.

TweakWhy_WindowsWelcomeExperience: Ibonisa ikhasi lokwamukela elinesikrini esigcwele ngemva kwezibuyekezo ezinkulu ze-Windows ezigqamisa izici ezintsha. Khubaza ukuze weqe lesi sikrini.
